features.description: CRUD for Caja Chica (petty cash periods)
steps: GET /api/petty-cash/cajas/{id} — verify saldo_final equals saldo_inicial, estatus is ABIERTA

features.description: Closing a caja chica recalculates saldo and sets CERRADA
steps: Create a caja chica with saldo_inicial: 5000
Create 2 movimientos: one ENTRADA 1000, one SALIDA 500

features.description: Cannot create movimientos on a closed caja chica
steps: Create and close a caja chica
POST /api/petty-cash/movimientos with numero_caja referencing closed caja

features.description: CRUD for Solicitud Caja (petty cash requests)
steps: POST /api/petty-cash/solicitudes with {motivo: 'Compra de utiles', monto_solicitado: 150, fecha_solicitud: '2024-01-20'} — verify 201

features.description: CRUD for Movimiento Caja (petty cash movements)
steps: Verify parent caja's ingreso_total and salida_total updated

features.description: Caja chica endpoints require ADMIN or CONTABILIDAD role
Caja Chica list page with aero-data-grid
steps: Verify grid columns: numero_caja, saldo_inicial, ingreso_total, salida_total, saldo_final, estatus (badge)
Verify filter bar with estatus filter (ABIERTA/CERRADA)
Verify 'Nueva Caja' button navigates to form

features.description: Caja Chica form creates new petty cash period
steps: Verify form-container with title 'Nueva Caja Chica'
Verify new caja appears in list

features.description: Caja Chica detail shows solicitudes and movimientos
steps: Verify solicitud sub-table displays related requests
Verify movimiento sub-table displays related movements
Verify 'Cerrar Caja' action button appears for ABIERTA status
Verify tab bar includes 'Caja Chica' tab

features.description: Backend tests for caja chica pass
